question: Is there an iron-gray metal railing positioned on the left side of the boardwalk?
Is the railing densely covered with at least a dozen padlocks?
Do the padlocks appear in various colors including gold, silver, red, and blue?
Are there 7 or 8 faded red and yellow prayer ribbons attached to the railing?
Is there a young man positioned in the right foreground?
Is the young man wearing an orange-red windbreaker and dark-brown high-top hiking boots?
Is the young man carrying a large dark-green hiking backpack?
Is the young man gripping the railing and looking back toward the camera?
Is there a blue sports drink bottle visible in the side pocket of the man's backpack?
Are there exactly two silver folding trekking poles leaning diagonally against the railing near the young man?
Is there a couple walking side by side on the boardwalk about three steps ahead of the young man?
Is the man in the couple wearing a black fleece jacket?
Is the woman in the couple wearing a lake-blue windbreaker and does she have a ponytail?
Is there a nearly vertical gray granite cliff face in the midground?
Is there an iron chain handrail embedded into the cliff face that appears polished/shiny?
Are there exactly two crooked small pine trees growing from the rock crevices?
Is there a narrow silver-white stream of water trickling down the cliff leaving wet streaks?
Is there a double-eaved wooden pavilion positioned to the right of the cliff?
Does the pavilion have peeling red paint and a roof with dark cyan glazed tiles and upturned eaves?
Is there a stone table and benches inside the pavilion?
Are there exactly four hikers sitting inside the pavilion?
Are the four hikers in the pavilion wearing gray, blue, red, and black jackets?
Does the background show at least 5 or 6 layers of undulating dark-green mountain ridges?
Is there thin milky-white morning mist wrapping or dividing the mountain ridges?
Is the summit of the farthest main peak covered with snow that glows with a pale golden light?
Does the sky show a gradient from light purple in the near sky to rose-gold dawn hues in the distance?
Are there any obvious distortions in the humans' limbs or faces (e.g., extra fingers, warped arms)?
Is the overall perspective physically plausible (boardwalk, railing, cliff, and pavilion aligned sensibly)?
